title: Whispering Earring
description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. Vakuu plays your first turn for you.
flavor: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...
notes: On the first turn of combat, Vakuu automatically plays cards from your hand in the following order: first, all cards with Imbued enchantment, then any remaining playable cards up to a maximum of 13 cards total. If all 13 cards are played, Vakuu displays a warning message; otherwise an approval message is shown.
